content.en:
In the days that followed, the Bloodman Tribe sent a large number of Primordial Antiquities cannon fodder to cooperate with Killua to attack the half-step Eightfold Ancestor among the cultivators.

Although Ye Tian blocked Killua, the other half-step Eightfold Ancestors might not be able to block it, even if the major forces knew about Killua's existence, Killua had the hope of killing one or two more half-step Eightfold Ancestors.

In the absence of a way to completely expel the cultivators, they had no other way but to resist the cultivators while trying to find a way.

......

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a way to quickly mine the space-time purple lazuli from a piece of information from the Nine-Story Building.

"Purple Lazuli Beast!"

This is the only creature that the Nine Buildings knows about that can quickly mine the Temporal Purple Lazuli, this creature can ignore the suppression of the Temporal Purple Lazuli Vein, and also ignore the solidity of the Temporal Purple Lazuli Vein, and can easily mine the Temporal Purple Lazuli Vein.

However, the Purple Lazuli Beast is rare, and it has little intelligence.

Even if the Nine-Fold Building had a half-step Eightfold Ancestor-level Purple Gold Stone Beast, there was no way to let it mine!

However, Ye Tian can copy the Purple Lazuli Beast!

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to search for the existence of the Purple Lazuli Stone Beast, and with the intelligence ability of the Nine-Story Building, it didn't take long to find the Purple Lazuli Stone Beast that Ye Tian needed.

This Purple Lazuli Stone Beast was only comparable to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Peak Realm, but it was enough.

After all, if you want to find a purple stone beast that happens to be comparable to the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor level, it is really too difficult!

Soon, Ye Tian saw this purple gold stone beast and left.

......

Secret place, space-time purple lazuli vein.

At this time, there was no primordial antiquity here, only Ye Tian alone.

"It seems that the Blood Tribe is not worried that I will dig up the space-time purple lazuli here, and there is no way to deal with me, so they have not sent the original antiquities over!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It just so happened that he could copy the Purple Lazuli Beast here.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian quickly copied the Purple Lazuli Beast.

The Purple Gold Stone Beast at the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor was very weak, and Ye Tian could kill it countless times in seconds with a wave of his hand.

However, it can easily mine these space-time purple lazuli.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the space-time purple lazuli vein as a purple lazuli beast, and his strength was not suppressed at all this time.

Moreover, with a flick of its claws, it can easily grasp through the ore veins and take out the space-time purple lazuli.

"It's so easy!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If he went to dig the space-time purple lazuli by himself, it would take a long time to dig one, but the purple lazuli beast could easily dig out a bunch of space-time purple lazuli.

At this rate, he could even hollow out this vein!

Dig!

Dig!

Dig!

Ye Tian doesn't care about anything else now, he just stays here to mine.

If there were other half-step Yae Origin Ancestors coming, he would drive them away, and this was already his territory!

And just like that, the years passed slowly.

During this time, the Blood Tribe sent countless primordial artifacts to fight the cultivators.

And the Nine-Story Building, the Ten Dao Mountains, and the others were also thinking about whether to continue to let this group of half-step Eightfold Ancestors stay inside and fight with the countless primordial antiquities?

With the existence of Killua, those half-step eightfold ancestors are always at risk of falling.

Of course, they could also send more half-step Yae Ancestors over, but the losses would still be great.

Primordial antiquities are not afraid of death, and they are easy to be born.

Comparatively speaking, the loss of a half-step Eightfold Ancestor among these forces is a huge loss!

However, this secret place is very valuable, and only a small part of it has been explored so far, so it would be a pity if you gave it up directly!

Soon, however, they decided to take over the secret place because of one thing, even at all costs.

It's just because a half-step eightfold ancestor discovered a treasure in the secret land-the Hunyuan Styx, which is an incomparably precious resource treasure land!

For the Primordial Antiquities, this resource is not of much value, but for the major forces among the cultivators, the Hunyuan Styx can have a huge effect on the life level of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, and even the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor who reaches a life level of 9 or above.

In other words, if you have this Hunyuan Styx, you can cultivate more half-step sevenfold ancestors with a life level of 9 or more!

What this represents, the major forces know very well!

That is, in the future, the major forces will have more Ninefold Ancestors, which is equivalent to increasing the top combat power of the major forces.

Therefore, the value of this secret place is too great, far from being comparable to the loss of some half-step Eightfold Ancestors!

And so.

The major forces began to increase the strength of these half-step eightfold ancestors at all costs, as well as the primordial Dao treasures and life-saving things that greatly increased their strength.

In addition, there is also a primordial Dao treasure that allows many half-step Yae Origin Ancestors to unite and exert a stronger fighting power.

In this way, many half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors joined forces to combine with the Primordial Dao Treasure, which was enough to burst out comparable to and surpass the Miracle Tree after casting the secret technique.

In this way, the threat of Killua is nothing.

In short, the Ninefold Ancestors of the major forces continued to deduce various plans just to take down this secret place.

......

"Damn, the losses have been terrible lately!"

Killua looked at his wounds, and although he recovered quickly, it would take a while.

And during this time, those half-step eightfold ancestors were frantically slaughtering the primordial artifacts here.

Even if the Bloodman tribe has a lot of primordial antiquities, it can't withstand the consumption of such a long time!

He then left the secret place and returned to the Bloodman Tribe to meet the Bloodman Tribe's elders.

He really can't bear it!

Soon, he returned.

"Elders, those cultivators have joined forces, and through a certain treasure joint battle, they have burst out with terrifying strength, I can't beat them!"

Killua said helplessly.

The three Avatar-level Blood Tribe Elders stationed at the entrance were already aware of the situation, but this secret place was also important to their Blood Tribe.

It was originally theirs, and they were naturally unwilling to give up!

"There's only one way to do it!"

A Transformation-level elder said.

The other two Avatar-level elders already knew what it was.

"What's the solution?"

Killua asked.

The Avatar-level elder said: "Let the blood people of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor level lower their cultivation to enter this secret place, even if the blood people of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor are reduced in cultivation, their physical fitness is still very strong, so even if their cultivation is reduced, their strength is also very strong." As long as there are enough Yaehara Ancestral Clansmen lost, there is still hope to drive out those cultivators!"

Killua was a little shocked by the Elder's choice, but it worked.

It's just that the blood people of the Eightfold Ancestor level are also very important, and there is also hope to become a transformation-level existence!

Of course, the Blood Man Tribe will definitely bring those Blood People who have no potential to become avatar-level into the secret land, and will not sacrifice the potential Yae Yuan Ancestor Clansmen!
